root_cause_summary: The accepted event did not include the aggregation key required by the billable metric.
root_cause_details: The billable metric aggregated usage by workspace_id, but the event properties only included region.
resolution_summary: Added workspace_id to the event properties and confirmed the metric matched.
resolution_steps: Opened Event Search for transaction tx-missing-aggregation.
Compared event properties with the metric aggregation key.
Added workspace_id to the submitted event properties.
verification_steps: Use Event Search to confirm workspace_id is present.
Verify the billable metric aggregates the corrected event.
Verify invoice usage includes the corrected aggregation value.
verification_results: Event Search showed workspace_id on the corrected event.
The billable metric aggregated the corrected event.
Invoice usage included the corrected aggregation value.
